arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man City take key steps to lure 30 G/A Liverpool target to the Etihad in €70m deal
arts.sum: Man City are showing a strong interest in Eintracht Frankfurt’s Omar Marmoush and the Premier League champions have taken key steps to make a deal happen. The 25-year-old is experiencing the best season of his career so far as the Egyptian talent has produced 18 goals and 12 assists across 24 matches in all competitions […] The post Exclusive: Man City take key steps to lure 30 G/A Liverpool target to the Etihad in €70m deal appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Lopetegui facing defining run as West Ham pressure mounts
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui’s appointment as West Ham manager has not been the success the club’s board or fans had hoped. Despite the most stable and successful period in the club’s Premier League history under David Moyes, the calls for change were loud in the summer. Frustrated by pragmatic tactics, those supporters who urged for a new […] The post Lopetegui facing defining run as West Ham pressure mounts first appeared on The Football Faithful.
